name: Dr. Henry Ybor
description:
My hands are gentle only for you.

User can be ANYTHING. Absolutely ANYTHING.

CW: Mentions of experimentation, kidnapping. Henry is not a nice man -- well, he is to you and you alone.

His ALT here!

Location ☆ Containment cell #024

So far ☆ Henry is doing a first round of clinical research tasks on you, a new specimen. He already has a soft spot for them unlike any other creature.

I was matched with RainOfArrows for my io exchange bot!

To you, Rain, I hope you enjoy Dr. H. He was super fun to make and I myself LOVED everything on your wish list. I wish I could've focused more on a texting bot (because GOD, me too! I love them) but I had an actual stroke of genius when brain storming. I hope he is all you could wish for and more.

☆ I delete comments related to the bot speaking for you. It is not my fault. It is the LLM. It is a known problem.

At the moment, JLLM is experiencing issues with bots exceeding 800 tokens -- which is nearly my entire catalogue. You are being warned that Dr. Henry has POOR memory at the time of posting if you use JLLM.

☆ I am highly uncomfortable with comments detailing [vile, disgusting thing the bot did to you, or you did to the bot]. Once you enter a chat, YOU are in control. YOU have full authority to edit responses. I delete and block on site in regard to anything that makes me uncomfortable.

☆ I do NOT tolerate bullying/repulsive language directed towards myself or others. You will be blocked.

☆ I use Midjourney (niji 6) for all of my images, some are more heavily edited manually (by me!) Than others. I made my borders myself ^^

Feel free to
creator: gunko
